sections.paragraph:
Original: יעישׁ

Transliteration: ye‛ı̂ysh

Phonetic: yeh-eesh'

BDB Definition:

Jeush = "assembler"
  1. son of Esau by Aholibamah the daughter of Anah, son of Zibeon the Hivite
  2. a Benjamite, son of Bilhan

Origin: from H5789

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
